---
title: "Module 4 AI Deployment Framework"
format: pptx
---

## Module 4: Key Considerations & Framework for Successful AI Deployment

- AIM ASEAN Programme: AI for MSME Advancement in ASEAN

## Introduction & Rationale

- Objective: Providing a structured framework for successful enterprise AI deployment.
- Why this Module: To bridge the gap between AI understanding and practical, sustainable implementation for MSMEs.
- Focus: Moving from AI fundamentals to real-world deployment and scaling.

## Core Components of the Framework

- Strategic Alignment: Ensuring AI initiatives support core business objectives.
- Risk Management: Identifying, assessing, and mitigating AI-related risks (e.g., security, bias).
- Governance: Establishing clear policies, ethical guidelines, and data usage standards.
- Monitoring & Auditing: Implementing continuous oversight to ensure performance and safety.

## Practical Implementation Strategies

- Step-by																															by Execution: Utilizing the AI Implementation Strategy and Dashboard.
- ROI-Driven Approach: Using the ROI Calculator to create a 'Success Blueprint.'
- Continuous Monitoring: Implementing post-deployment audits to detect vulnerabilities and adversarial attacks.
- Iterative Development: Adopting Agile methodologies and continuous testing/adaptation.

## Empowering MSMEs with Resources

- Templates: AI Project Risk Scorecard, AI Governance Framework (Simplified), and Bias Reduction Checklists.
- Directories: Access to the AI Tools Directory for selecting the right models.
- Hands-on Tools: Experimenting with Google Gemini and NotebookLM for practical use cases.
- Success Tracking: Using the ROI Calculator for impact assessment.

## Continuous Improvement & Resilience

- Learning from Failure: Analyzing setbacks to refine deployment strategies and avoid repeated errors.
- Post-Deployment Audits: Regular checks on security, data privacy, and model accuracy.
- Adapting to Change: Staying updated with evolving AI technologies and market trends in the ASEAN region.

## Summary & Next Steps

- Recap of the Deployment Framework.
- Importance of a structured, risk-aware approach.
- Open Floor for Questions and Discussion.
